summary: P3.1/P3.2/P3.3 features validated successfully. Backend APIs and frontend UI all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: P3.1: Schema Form Editor correctly renders typed controls - string inputs for 'title'/'body' in shared.text-block, enum dropdown for 'placement' in shared.ad-slot
P3.1: Advanced JSON fallback ('Gelişmiş JSON') available for all components
P3.2: Diff summary displays Row/Column/Component change counts in canvas header
P3.2: Width controls (D/T/M dropdowns) working for responsive layout - no regression from P2
P3.2: Row reorder controls (Yukarı/Aşağı) and component move controls (↑/↓) present
P3.3: STEP_COMPONENT_RULES correctly filters components by wizard step (Steps 1-4: no ads, Steps 5-7: ads allowed)
P3.3: Backend whitelist enforces listing_create_stepX allowed components - returns 400 for disallowed keys/props
P3.3: listing.create.default-content always preserved in runtime payload

success_rate.backend: 100% (All P3.3 guard tests passed via curl - allowed components accepted, disallowed components rejected with 400)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (P3.1 schema form editor verified, P3.2 diff summary visible, width/drag controls working)

seed_data_creation: Test pages created with unique module names during backend testing
